summary.en-US: Extracts the Google Labs session cookie and syncs it to a user-configured Flow2API endpoint.
summary.zh-CN: 提取 Google Labs 登录态，并同步到用户自己配置的 Flow2API 接口。

description.en-US: Flow2API Token Updater reads the Google Labs session cookie from labs.google after the user configures the extension, then sends the extracted token to the user-configured Flow2API endpoint. It supports Chromium browsers as well as Firefox-based browsers such as Firefox and Zen, and can bind separate accounts to the default session, the active tab, or a fixed Firefox cookie store/container.
description.zh-CN: Flow2API Token Updater 会在用户主动配置后，从 labs.google 读取指定登录态，并把提取到的会话 Token 发送到用户自己填写的 Flow2API 接口。它支持 Chromium 以及 Firefox / Zen 等 Firefox 系浏览器，并可将不同账号绑定到默认会话、当前活动标签，或固定的 Firefox cookie store / container。

version.approval_notes: This extension only accesses cookies for https://labs.google/ and extracts the __Secure-next-auth.session-token value. The extracted session token is only sent to the API URL explicitly configured by the user in the extension popup. No analytics, advertising, telemetry, or third-party tracking endpoints are included. connectionToken values are stored in browser local storage only, while non-sensitive configuration is stored in sync storage. Privacy policy: https://banana.rematrixed.com/privacy
